## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — Tooling, CI, dependencies
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — Code change without new feature or bug fix
- [ ] `test` — Adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD change
